query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_versions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationId` int NOT NULL,
  `versionNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `snapshotData` json NOT NULL,
  `changeDescription` text,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `quotation_versions_quotation_idx` (`quotationId`),
  KEY `quotation_versions_version_idx` (`quotationId`, `versionNumber`),
  CONSTRAINT `quotation_versions_quotationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`quotationId`) REFERENCES `quotations`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `quotation_versions_createdBy_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `quotation_versions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `quotationId` int NOT NULL,
  `versionNumber` int NOT NULL,
  `snapshotData` json NOT NULL,
  `changeDescription` text,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  KEY `quotation_versions_quotation_idx` (`quotationId`),
  KEY `quotation_versions_version_idx` (`quotationId`, `versionNumber`),
  CONSTRAINT `quotation_versions_quotationId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`quotationId`) REFERENCES `quotations`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `quotation_versions_createdBy_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`createdBy`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
